raw_consumer_statement: I have filed several disputes with My Best Buy XXXX XXXX. Repeatedly, they have denied my disputes where I was given no resolution. The most recent one was with XXXX where XXXX did not provide me the services I purchased then proceeded to charge me more for the same services. This happened twice and My Best Buy XXXX XXXX took no action to recoup my money. Another instance was when I put a deposit on a hotel that was never refunded. I followed the protocol by My Best Buy XXXX XXXX to file a dispute but they refused to provide a resolution.
